title: CLAUDE.md stale '15-line dispatch function' claim
description: Line 103-104 says 'except the 15-line dispatch function in secretx/src/lib.rs'. There are now three dispatch functions (from_uri, from_uri_writable, from_signing_uri). The claim is both wrong (count) and misleading (singular function). Also: workspace table missing secretx-local-signing entry.
